seo_description: Current time in Kyiv (Kiev), Ukraine. Eastern European Time — EET (UTC+2) in winter, EEST (UTC+3) during DST. Live clock and time differences for Kyiv.

faq.question: What time is it in Kyiv (Kiev) right now?
faq.answer: Kyiv (also spelled Kiev), Ukraine uses Eastern European Time (EET, UTC+2) in winter and Eastern European Summer Time (EEST, UTC+3) during Daylight Saving Time. The IANA identifier is Europe/Kyiv. Ukraine observes DST, with clocks springing forward on the last Sunday in March and falling back on the last Sunday in October. The live clock above shows the current Kyiv time.

faq.question: What time zone is Kyiv (Kiev) in?
faq.answer: Kyiv, Ukraine is in the Eastern European Time Zone. It uses Eastern European Time (EET, UTC+2) in winter and Eastern European Summer Time (EEST, UTC+3) during Daylight Saving Time. The IANA identifier is Europe/Kyiv. Kyiv is on the same time as Bucharest, Helsinki, Athens, and Riga during standard time.

faq.question: Does Kyiv observe daylight saving time?
faq.answer: Yes. Kyiv, Ukraine observes Daylight Saving Time following the European schedule. Clocks spring forward 1 hour on the last Sunday in March at 3:00 AM (EET → EEST, UTC+2 → UTC+3) and fall back on the last Sunday in October at 4:00 AM (EEST → EET). Ukraine continues to observe DST and has not adopted permanent summer time despite EU discussions.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Kyiv and London?
faq.answer: Kyiv (EET, UTC+2) is 2 hours ahead of London (GMT, UTC+0) in winter. During UK summer (BST, UTC+1) and Ukraine's summer (EEST, UTC+3), Kyiv is still 2 hours ahead of London. Both countries transition DST on the same last Sunday schedule, keeping the 2-hour gap consistent year-round.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Kyiv and New York?
faq.answer: Kyiv (EET, UTC+2) is 7 hours ahead of New York (EST, UTC-5) in winter. During US summer (EDT, UTC-4), Kyiv (EEST, UTC+3) is still 7 hours ahead of New York. The gap is constant at 7 hours year-round because both sides change clocks at roughly the same time of year.

faq.question: What are typical business hours in Kyiv?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in Kyiv are 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM EET/EEST, Monday through Friday. Kyiv is Ukraine's capital and economic center, home to Ukraine's major banks (PrivatBank, Oschadbank), tech companies, and government institutions. The IT sector is particularly strong — Ukraine has a large tech workforce and many global companies have development offices in Kyiv. The Khreshchatyk and Podil districts are major business and cultural hubs.
